title: ANC - Change Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech)
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-setting (Environment/Speech) selection does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Choose either Environment or Speech mode
Close the ANC tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping back
Reopen the ANC tab by tapping ANC again in Device Settings
expected: The Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech) selected earlier should persist and be displayed as the current mode after reopening the ANC tab.
